```cpp
bool write_data_with_check(std::vector<uint8_t>& buffer, uint32_t header, const std::vector<uint32_t>& items) {

    hexi::buffer_adaptor<std::vector<uint8_t>> adaptor(buffer);

}
```

   void read_container(container_type& container, const count_type count) {
       using cvalue_type = typename container_type::value_type;

       if constexpr(!memcpy_read<container_type, binary_stream>) {
           container.clear();
       }

       if constexpr(has_reserve<container_type>) {

       }

       if constexpr(memcpy_read<container_type, binary_stream>) {

           const auto bytes = static_cast<size_type>(count * sizeof(cvalue_type));
           SAFE_READ(container.data(), bytes, void());
       } else {
           for(count_type i = 0; i < count; ++i) {
               cvalue_type value;
               *this >> value;
               container.emplace_back(std::move(value));
           }
       }
   }

```cpp
#include <hexi/hexi.h>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <span>

struct CompactPacket {
    uint32_t packet_id;
    std::vector<std::string> tags;
    std::string data;
};

std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_compact_packet(const CompactPacket& packet) {
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer);
    stream << packet.packet_id;
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint{packet.tags};
    stream << hexi::prefixed_varint{packet.data};
    return buffer;
}

CompactPacket deserialize_compact_packet(const std::span<const uint8_t> buffer) {
    CompactPacket packet;
    std::vector<uint8_t> buffer_data(buffer.begin(), buffer.end());
    hexi::binary_stream stream(buffer_data);
    stream >> packet.packet_id;
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint{packet.tags};
    stream >> hexi::prefixed_varint{packet.data};
    return packet;
}
```

   std::vector<uint8_t> serialize_protocol_packet(const ProtocolPacket& packet) {
        // Create a vector to hold the serialized data
        std::vector<uint8_t> buffer;

        // Create a binary_stream for writing, using the buffer
        hexi::binary_stream<std::vector<uint8_t>> stream(buffer);

        // Convert message_id to big-endian and write
        auto message_id_be = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.message_id);
        stream.write(&message_id_be, sizeof(message_id_be));

        // Convert each element in data_values to big-endian and write the container
        std::vector<uint16_t> data_values_be;
        data_values_be.reserve(packet.data_values.size());
        for (auto value : packet.data_values) {
            data_values_be.push_back(hexi::endian::native_to_big(value));
        }
        stream.write_container(data_values_be);

        // Convert checksum to big-endian and write
        auto checksum_be = hexi::endian::native_to_big(packet.checksum);
        stream.write(&checksum_be, sizeof(checksum_be));

        return buffer;
   }

            write(container.data(), bytes);

            }
        }

   void read_container(container_type& container, const count_type count) {
